sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى مُصْطَفَى فَلَافِلَ مِنَ الدُّكَّانِ الصَّغِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Mustafa je kupio falafel u maloj prodavnici.
sentences.translationEn: Mustafa bought falafel from the small shop.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَهُ فِي الْخُبْزِ مَعَ الطَّمَاطِمِ وَالطَّحِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stavio ga je u hljeb sa paradajzom i tahinijem.
sentences.translationEn: He put it in the bread with tomatoes and tahini.

sentences.translation: Jeo ga je dok je hodao ulicom.
sentences.translationEn: He ate it while walking in the street.

sentences.translation: Bio je to brzi obrok ali ukusan.
sentences.translationEn: It was a quick meal but appetizing.
